calls.notes: Calls App.handleSearch, which imperatively invokes DocumentGrid.handleSearch via this.documentGridRef; prop is only called when query.trim() is non-empty.
If query.trim() is empty, falls back to loadDocuments() (GET /api/documents) instead of search.
HTTP GET /api/search?q={encodeURIComponent(query)}. Sets DocumentGrid state: documents = response.data.results.
Normalizes query (trim + toLowerCase), then delegates to IndexManager. Re-ranks results by setting score=1.0 on every row (no-op).
isIndexAvailable() always returns false; always delegates to FallbackSearchProvider. The index-available branch is dead code.
SELECT * FROM documents_v2 WHERE name ILIKE '%{query}%' ORDER BY uploaded_at DESC. Only the name column is searched; tags column is not used in the WHERE clause.
